comments.author: Steve
comments.text:
We will need a refinement to the Undo flow. In the TS game I don't even allow you to undo if your board state is clean. In fact, I don't even show the button if the board is clean.

I want to relax this flow so that players can choose to undo even a "clean" move. But we should ask for confirmation first. A good UI thing to have in any program is a low-friction way to ask users yes-no questions. It's a pain to build it the first time, but then you will never regret it.
